meta.title: Richard Weitz on U.S. troop withdrawal from Iraq for C-SPAN
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Political-Military Analysis Richard Weitz joined C-SPAN's program "Washington Journal" on August 3, 2010 to discuss President Obama's speech and U.S. troop withdrawal from Iraq.
